title: Ghost Ark Evidence Provenance Label
description: A provenance-labeled evidence element. The provenance class ranks the evidence by who must be compromised to fabricate it under the assumptions in docs/research/EVIDENCE_PROVENANCE_LATTICE.md. It does not state that the evidence content is true. CROSS_WITNESSED is derive-only and must not appear on a single element; it may only appear as a derived aggregate class.

provenanceClass.description: Assignable classes only. CROSS_WITNESSED is excluded because it is derived from agreeing independent records, never assigned.

labeledBy.description: Identifier of the boundary component that assigned the label. Labels are assigned by enforcement-boundary code, never by the agent whose evidence is being labeled.
